prerequisites: Only the target project's public project_id — no secret, no account with Stytch

mechanisms.description: Genuinely anonymous RFC 7591 Dynamic Client Registration, built explicitly for the agentic/MCP story. Public clients get no secret and use PKCE.
Authenticated management path: HTTP Basic base64(project_id:secret) creates confidential connected-app clients.

methods.bootstrap: Copy the project_id and secret from the Stytch dashboard for your project.

credentials.rotation: Confidential client secrets are shown exactly once; public (DCR) clients have no secret and use PKCE.

scopes.notes: client_type taxonomy (first_party / first_party_public / third_party / third_party_public) plus token_endpoint_auth_method.

args.name: redirect_uri
args.description: Redirect URI for the public client

steps.description: Anonymous RFC 7591 registration of a third-party public client.

gaps: The canonical DCR endpoint is the project's custom authentication domain (https://{projectDomain}/v1/oauth2/register); the legacy public path used here should be verified per project.
